dict.string: Kattappa AI OS only reads Desktop files when you ask it to work with a Desktop file or create a Desktop shortcut.
Kattappa AI OS only reads project files when you ask it to inspect or work on a selected local project.
Kattappa AI OS only reads Downloads files when you ask it to open, inspect, or process a downloaded file.
Kattappa AI OS uses the microphone only when you press Voice for local wake-name commands and speech-to-text.
Kattappa AI OS uses Screen Recording only for approved local screen-reading or cursor-guidance tasks.
